summary:
MINISTRY FOCUS AND SPIRITUAL PREPARATION: Brandon discusses the necessity of maintaining a strong personal relationship with God amidst daily responsibilities and ministry demands. Brandon recounts a past experience where Reinhard Bonnke laid hands on him, resulting in a profound impartation. Brandon emphasizes the importance of spiritual preparedness to weather upcoming natural and financial storms, urging individuals to establish a solid biblical foundation.

TRIBULATION VISIONS AND END-TIME EVENTS: Brandon shares details of an experience from July 6, 2014, where he states Jesus showed him the tribulation period. Brandon describes a nighttime scenario in America characterized by the sudden disappearance of children and ensuing chaos. Brandon details the emergence of the Antichrist at a meeting in Berlin, where global leaders surrender their authority in exchange for a false sense of peace. During this period, Brandon describes widespread drone surveillance using devices that sound like bees to hunt individuals lacking the mark of the beast, enforcing compliance through severe penalties by individuals in black Hummers. Brandon also mentions severe environmental phenomena, such as a depleted ozone layer causing extreme sun scorching.

ALIEN DECEPTION AND DIGITAL SYSTEMS: Brandon recounts being told about a forthcoming global deception involving aliens, designed to explain away the mass disappearance of people. Brandon connects this to the recent disappearance of scientists associated with classified UFO information. Brandon warns about the impending rollout of a digital financial system and digital currency, referencing figures like Jerome Powell and Kevin Warsh in relation to the integration of digital assets. Brandon also describes a new flag associated with the Antichrist featuring elements representing the five pillars of Islam and a sickle sword.

POLITICAL OBSERVATIONS AND NATIONAL THREATS: Brandon emphasizes the need to pray for President Trump's protection and success, mentioning potential threats such as impeachment, the 25th Amendment, and the possibility of Senate seats flipping. Brandon references recent news about fake portable cell towers in Toronto disrupting millions of phones, connecting this to his previous warnings of communication disruptions originating from boxcars in cities like Atlanta, Chicago, and Seattle. Brandon compares these coordinated domestic threats to a Red Dawn or D-Day scenario, describing them as multiple small-scale attacks occurring simultaneously. Brandon also mentions praying for Karoline Leavitt and her unborn child due to public stress.

UPCOMING REVIVAL AND CHURCH TRANSFORMATIONS: Brandon foresees a massive, unprecedented spiritual revival akin to Azusa Street, highlighting figures like John Kilpatrick, Perry Stone, and Jentezen Franklin. Brandon describes a specific dream where a spontaneous revival breaks out in the shoe department of a Dillard's store, with people experiencing sudden healing and spiritual baptism. Brandon emphasizes that this new movement will break traditional boundaries and preconceptions of how church services operate.

WEATHER COMMAND AND SOCIETAL CHANGES: Brandon recalls a March 31st vision of a destructive long-track tornado in Oklahoma, affecting areas like Logan County, Ponca City, and Stillwater, using this to instruct people on taking verbal authority over severe weather systems. Brandon also discusses concerning societal and legislative developments, specifically pointing to the Netherlands passing laws allowing lab-grown babies from genetic material of two men, self-fertilization, and child euthanasia.

ECONOMIC VISIONS AND SYMBOLISM: Brandon describes highly symbolic visions concerning the United States economy, depicting it as flatlining and potentially facing conditions worse than 2008. Brandon sees President Trump holding red poker cards as a bluff and floating on a yellow plastic life raft in a sea of green, toxic economic sludge. The vision includes a massive syringe representing a temporary economic stimulus to delay an inevitable collapse. Brandon also mentions seeing a half-soccer ball topped with a golden goose directing lines toward Africa and South America, a uterus marked with the year 2030, and advancements in AI medical surgeries.
rawData: [April 27, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/-2rEylREFj0]-[Well, welcome family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to just get right to praying. Just because I dump out with you all doesn't mean I don't keep vertical with him, and I want to make sure I'm hearing him in top shape. Keeping my relationship with him above all this other stuff; it doesn't matter to me if it all goes away tomorrow, I still have him. And that's what I want to make sure: that we're always good and that in my heart I'm seeking his face. There's so much ministry that pulls you every single day, and you can get distracted with it. We have power and authority over storms, you know, and God has given us that. As he is, so are we in this world. Whenever I see a storm and it's a tornado right in front of me, well, I'm just going to be bold and just go out there like David and say, "Who is this uncircumcised Philistine that defies the armies of God?"' No, this tornado or whatever. Or, you know, when the plague comes again that I've told you countless times the Lord has warned me about, we must take authority and start to activate that inside of you. Psalm 91, Psalm 23, getting it down inside of your heart because of the storm that I've seen over and over. Financial storms, financial crisis, major shakings to awaken. And the only way you're going to weather the storm is by knowing who you are in Christ, by having a foundation of the word of God down inside of yourself, staying vertical. If I'm not here and YouTube was to go away, where will you be? If these other people—there's a lot of you that are baby Christians—but you must learn and have the meat of the word down inside of you. You've got to get that backbone like a crowbar. Who are you listening to? Who's pouring into your life? I like to listen to Reinhard Bonnke a lot. Reinhard Bonnke is one of my favorites. After he prayed for me and laid hands on me that day I told you all, when I was a young man and I got an impartation that day, it changed my life forever. And when Reinhard Bonnke prayed for me, he said, 'I put a double portion of the anointing that's on my life on you.' And he laid hands on me and the fire of God—I'm talking a lightning bolt—came out of heaven. It felt this way. It shook me. I was like a sack of potatoes on the ground when that happened. It changed me when I got up off the floor. And I'm not giving any glory to Reinhard Bonnke. Reinhard Bonnke was just a man that was yielded to Jesus. But I always respect my elders and I respect the anointing. And there was impartation that day; there was something that happened, there was an exchange. Do you have to have an impartation from somebody to get that? No. You can have it right in the middle of your house right now where you're watching. But you've got to get yourself in the river in prayer and worship and seeking him daily. Not just on Sundays and whenever they have something at the church. You've got to have a personal relationship with Jesus where you're going vertical. I told you there's a storm coming. I told you there's a shaking to awaken coming to our nation. We must pray for President Trump. As you can see, I told you this is not just the one opportunity that I've seen; there's much more that we have to pray for our president to make it across the finish line of what God has called him to do. The enemy would try to kill, steal, and destroy. Right? We know what the devil's mode of operation, his whole plan is. So we've got to come against it by the blood of the Lamb. We've got to plead the blood. You've got to take communion daily. You've got to seek his face daily. We must work while it is still light, for night is coming. It's time for us to get an enthusiasm inside of us, a stirring on the inside of us knowing that the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is at hand. The church must wake up. It's not just about filling pews or chairs at the church, having full auditoriums. It's about telling people that it's time to repent and it's time to fall down on our knees before a holy God and get right with him because there's many of you that are about to be left. It's time to come to church with a heart of worship and thanksgiving for what he's already done in your life. But get ready, for he is about to do something even greater. The greatest outpouring of the Spirit of God is about to hit this earth like we've never seen before. What we have seen in the past is nothing compared to what we're about to see. And there's many of you that are so lackadaisical in your relationship with the Lord and you're so lukewarm and you don't even realize that the water is getting hot all around you and the pot is beginning to boil and you're in it. But this dispensation of grace is coming to an end. The Lord Jesus Christ is coming for his church, but he's coming back for a bride that's without spot or wrinkle, that is sold out to him and not sold out to the world. Pray for their health that they would be restored with the glory to be restored like Moses, that his eyes did not grow dim." And I saw a renewing like the eagles, that their flesh would not fade with the glory. The glory kept them. The glory kept Moses. The glory will keep these men. And I saw to pray for them more. So we prayed for them last broadcast. Then we prayed for President Trump and the Lord said, "Pray for a protection around him." It's increasing." And I saw it went from one—they would have it by one—to having it by three. And he said, "If you don't start praying now, they will win the House and the Senate and your president is in jeopardy even by impeachment." 25th Amendment. The 25th Amendment. But the main things I have on my heart right now is your life and your heart. Where are you with Jesus? Do you know him? And more importantly, does he know you? I'm not talking about your grandma's religion that she used to talk to you about as a little boy. You say, "Well, yeah, you know, grandma used to talk about Jesus all the time." I'm talking about a personal relationship with the Lord Jesus Christ. Do you know him? If you were to die tonight, where would you spend eternity? There is a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. We've heard it all the time, especially if you've been in the church a long time. But this is a true statement. The Lord said to go over some of the things I saw when I went to tribulation tonight. So, I am being obedient to what he told me to do real quick. So, bear with me. It's 15 minutes, but I'm going to go over this really quick. The lightning was just bolting and there was no thunder. It was just a light show. And I remember the lady screaming, "The aliens came and got them! The aliens!" That's what they... they were deceived. They didn't know where everybody disappeared. Everybody from the children that were age 15 and younger were all gone. So their mothers were all frantically looking for their children. They were screaming through the streets and they were looking and calling out their names and they were in panic looking for the kids that were gone. All the mothers were running up and down the street screaming for their children and they were all raptured. Now, there's some of you that don't believe in the rapture. That's fine. If you don't want to hear this, click out and go away. But I'm telling you, for those that are here and you want to know what's coming, I'm going to tell you. I believe in the rapture of the church. The things that you say, "I was once lost and now I'm found." You say, "I'm back living in it." And you say, "Well, I'm still saved," but I'm going to tell you, you're mistaken. I tried to tell my son how to make it. He did. I said, "This is what it looked like." I just have an urgency as I see all the signs of the times all around me, and I just wanted to bring that to you tonight because I saw those drones and things and it hit me—that noise. I could hear that noise and they were running from that noise. It sounded like bees. It sounded like bees and I said, "Oh no, it's coming." There's many of you who are running out of time. I don't know this man, but I pray for him; I've seen his church. A bigger church is coming. A much more Holy Ghost church is coming. There won't be room enough to have them all. They're going to be lined up outside down in that area—Alabama. I'm telling you, the parking lot was full; there was not enough room for everybody. And the same thing with Perry Stone, the same thing with Jentezen, the same thing with Minnesota—there's one in Colorado. There's not enough churches that have prayed. This is going to come through prayer. That's why the Lord said, "Raise up a million men and women prayer army for these end times," and this will be a place of oasis for people to come and drink. This main minister was in there and the Holy Ghost and fire fell in the Dillard's store and people were laying out everywhere with the power of God falling on them, and they were being healed by the power of the Lord because a revival broke out in Dillard's.
